channel.title: LLM Timeline — H2O.ai Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from H2O.ai.

item.title: H2O-Danube3-4B (H2O.ai)
item.description: Parameters: H2O-Danube3-4B License: open Type: model Runs natively and fully offline on mobile phone. "H2O-Danube3 is a family of decoder only LLM models that use the general Llama model architecture adopting core principles from Llama 2 and Mistral with custom parameters determining the shape of each layer and total parameter count. We use the Mistral tokenizer..." MMLU for chat=54.74, base=55.18 via https://huggingface.co/h2oai/h2o-danube3-4b-base
